comment: COSIB explained recursion better than my textbook. Really helped before my exam.
Useful for checking announcements quickly instead of going to the notice board.
The chat stopped responding mid-answer once, had to refresh.
Would love if COSIB could also generate practice questions for past exams, not just general topics.
Good for programming questions, but didn't know the SIWES coordinator's contact when I asked.
The quiz generation feature is great for last-minute revision.
Please add dark mode — using it late at night in the hostel.
